Event - Class in com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.event
Represents an event that users can book tickets for.

EventController is a REST controller that handles HTTP requests related to events.

Repository interface for managing Event entities.

Service class for managing event-related operations.

existsByEmail(String) - Method in interface com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.user.UserRepository
Checks if a user exists with the given email address.
existsByTitle(String) - Method in interface com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.event.EventRepository
Checks if an event exists with the given title.
